ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsor of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_funding" TEXT /* Current amount of funding received */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead researcher of the project */,
  "funding_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about funding sources */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_outputs" TEXT /* Outputs of the project (e.g., publications, patents) */,
  "collaborator_ids" TEXT /* IDs of collaborating researchers or institutions */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the sponsor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the sponsor organization */,
  "contact_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the primary contact person */,
  "funding_history" TEXT /* History of past funding contributions by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or profile of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., Lead, Co-Investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_topics" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_locations" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., Publication, Patent) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the output */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outputs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the sponsor of the project
Total budget allocated for the project
Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold)
Reference to the lead researcher of the project
Outputs of the project (e.g., publications, patents)
IDs of collaborating researchers or institutions
Contact phone number of the sponsor
Name of the primary contact person at the sponsor organization
Designation of the primary contact person
History of past funding contributions by the sponsor
Department or affiliation of the researcher
Brief biography or profile of the researcher
Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., Lead, Co-Investigator)
